name: First product price is within the applied filter range of 100 to 1000

steps.name: Given the user is on the Laptops category page
When the user enters min price "100" and max price "1000"
And the user clicks the Set button
Then products should be visible on the page
And the first product price should be within the range 100 and 1000
And the user clicks the Clear button

attachments.name: logs_First product price is within the applied filter range of 100 to 1000

fullName: Best Buy Price Filter Validation: First product price is within the applied filter range of 100 to 1000
